channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [JONJUA] Jonjua Overseas registers 'JONJUA CSR TRUST' for CSR activities
item.description:
Jonjua Overseas Ltd has announced the registration of a charitable trust, 'JONJUA CSR TRUST', on April 13, 2026. This trust is established to undertake Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) activities on behalf of the company, aiming to effectively utilize CSR funds. The initiative reflects the company's commitment to sustainable and responsible corporate citizenship. The Trust will operate exclusively for charitable purposes, aligning with Schedule VII of the Companies Act, 2013, and the company's CSR Policy. Its activities will adhere to Section 135 of the Companies Act, 2013, applicable provisions of the Income Tax Act, 1961, and all other relevant statutory regulations.

  • Jonjua Overseas registered 'JONJUA CSR TRUST' on April 13, 2026.
  • Trust established to undertake Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) activities.
  • Aims to effectively utilize CSR funds and ensure compliance.
  • Aligns with company's commitment to sustainable corporate citizenship.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Jonjua Overseas Ltd | Category: CSR

item.title: [NESCO] NESCO VP (Events & Exhibitions) arrested on April 13, 2026
item.description:
NESCO Ltd announced that its Vice President (Events and Exhibitions), a Senior Managerial Personnel, was taken into police custody on April 13, 2026. This action follows an unfortunate incident that occurred on April 11, 2026, during an event organized at the Nesco Exhibition Center. The company stated it is fully cooperating with the concerned authorities and currently foresees no impact on the listed entity.

  • NESCO's VP (Events & Exhibitions) arrested on April 13, 2026.
  • Arrest follows an incident at Nesco Exhibition Center on April 11, 2026.
  • Company is fully cooperating with the concerned authorities.
  • No impact on the listed entity is foreseen as of now.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NESCO LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [FINOPB] Fino Payments Bank MD & CEO Rishi Gupta unavailable over 45 days
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Fino Payments Bank Ltd announced that its Managing Director & Chief Executive Officer, Mr. Rishi Gupta, has been unavailable to perform his role for over 45 days in a rolling 90-day period. This unavailability stems from a pending re-assessment of his "fit and proper" status. Mr. Gupta will resume office as MD & CEO once the Bank's Nomination and Remuneration Committee, Board of Directors, and the Reserve Bank of India complete their review. An Interim CEO was appointed with RBI's approval during this period. The Bank assured stakeholders that operations remain stable and uninterrupted. It also highlighted recent positive business momentum, including its highest-ever deposit balance in March 2026 and strong growth in its referral lending business.

  • MD & CEO Rishi Gupta unavailable for over 45 days due to fit & proper status re-assessment.
  • His return depends on review by Bank's Board and RBI approval.
  • An Interim CEO has been appointed with RBI's approval.
  • Bank assures stable, uninterrupted operations and strong business fundamentals.
  • Recent updates include record deposits and strong referral lending momentum.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Fino Payments Bank Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [POONAWALLA] Poonawalla Fincorp QIP closes, allocates 67.43M shares at ₹370.75
item.description:
Poonawalla Fincorp's Committee of Directors approved the closure of its Qualified Institutions Placement (QIP) on April 13, 2026. The company allocated 67,430,883 equity shares to eligible qualified institutional buyers at an issue price of ₹370.75 per share. This price includes a premium of ₹368.75 per share and represents a 5.00% discount (₹19.51 per share) to the floor price of ₹390.26. The placement document dated April 13, 2026, was also approved and adopted. The QIP had opened on April 9, 2026, and the trading window for designated persons remains closed.

  • Poonawalla Fincorp's QIP closed on April 13, 2026.
  • 67,430,883 equity shares were allocated to QIBs.
  • Issue price set at ₹370.75 per equity share.
  • Price reflects a 5.00% discount to the floor price.
  • Placement document dated April 13, 2026, was adopted.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Poonawalla Fincorp Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [ACMESOLAR] ACME Solar challenges GST show cause cum demand notice in High Court
item.description:
ACME Solar Holdings Ltd has filed a civil writ petition before the Hon'ble Rajasthan High Court on April 13, 2026. This petition challenges a show cause cum demand notice (SCN) previously issued by GST authorities, as intimated on March 29, 2026. The company is taking legal action to contest the SCN.

  • ACME Solar filed a civil writ petition on April 13, 2026.
  • The petition challenges a show cause cum demand notice from GST authorities.
  • The legal challenge has been filed before the Rajasthan High Court.
  • This is an update to a previous intimation regarding the SCN.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ACME Solar Holdings Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [5PAISA] 5paisa Capital Allots 15.63 Mn Rights Equity Shares for ₹4,688.23 Mn
item.description:
5paisa Capital Ltd's Board of Directors, at its meeting on April 13, 2026, approved the allotment of 15,627,419 fully paid-up equity shares through a Rights Issue. The shares were issued at a price of ₹300 per share, including a premium of ₹290, aggregating to ₹4,688.23 million. This allotment follows previous board approvals for fund-raising via a rights issue. The company received applications for 19,328,292 shares, indicating strong investor interest. Consequently, the paid-up equity share capital of the company has increased from ₹312.55 million (31,254,838 shares) to ₹468.82 million (46,882,257 shares).

  • Board approved allotment of 15,627,419 Rights Equity Shares.
  • Shares allotted at ₹300 each, including a ₹290 premium.
  • Company raised ₹4,688.23 million through the Rights Issue.
  • Paid-up capital increased to ₹468.82 million post-allotment.
  • Applications received for 19,328,292 shares, indicating oversubscription.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: 5paisa Capital Ltd | Category: Rights Issue

item.title: [JUSTDIAL] Just Dial Q4 FY26: Revenue up 6.2% YoY to ₹307.2 Cr, Net Profit ₹100 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Just Dial Limited announced its financial and operating results for the fourth quarter and full fiscal year ended March 31, 2026. For Q4 FY26, Operating Revenue grew 6.2% year-on-year to ₹307.2 Crores. EBITDA stood at ₹88.8 Crores, up 3.2% YoY, maintaining a healthy margin of 28.9%. Operating PBT increased by 7.3% YoY to ₹76.1 Crores. However, Net Profit for the quarter was ₹100.0 Crores, a decrease of 36.6% YoY, primarily due to a significant 55.2% YoY drop in other income, impacted by bond yields, and a normalized effective tax rate. Cash and Investments as of March 31, 2026, were ₹5,852.2 Crores. Total traffic (unique visitors) for the quarter was 182.4 million, down 4.7% YoY, while total active listings increased 12.1% YoY to 54.7 million. Active paid campaigns grew 3.0% YoY to 631,530.

  • Q4 FY26 Operating Revenue increased 6.2% YoY to ₹307.2 Crores.
  • Net Profit for Q4 FY26 was ₹100.0 Crores, down 36.6% YoY.
  • EBITDA margin stood at 28.9%, with EBITDA up 3.2% YoY to ₹88.8 Crores.
  • Cash and Investments reached ₹5,852.2 Crores as of March 31, 2026.
  • Total Active Listings grew 12.1% YoY to 54.7 million.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JUST DIAL LTD. | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [5PAISA] 5paisa Capital approves ₹468.82 Cr rights issue allotment
item.description:
5paisa Capital Ltd's Board of Directors, at its meeting on April 13, 2026, approved the allotment of 15,627,419 fully paid-up equity shares. These shares were issued at a price of ₹300 per share, including a premium of ₹290, as part of a rights issue. The total amount raised through this issue is ₹4,688.23 million. The company had received applications for 19,328,292 shares, indicating strong investor interest. Following this allotment, the paid-up equity share capital of 5paisa Capital has increased from ₹312.55 million (31,254,838 shares) to ₹468.82 million (46,882,257 shares). This action is a culmination of previous board approvals for fund-raising via a rights issue.

  • Board approved allotment of 15,627,419 equity shares.
  • Rights issue raised ₹4,688.23 million at ₹300 per share.
  • Issue price included a premium of ₹290 per share.
  • Paid-up equity capital increased to ₹468.82 million.
  • Applications received for 19,328,292 shares, indicating oversubscription.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: 5paisa Capital Ltd | Category: Rights Issue

item.title: [JUSTDIAL] Just Dial FY26 Results Approved; CFO Abhishek Bansal Resigns
item.description:
Just Dial Ltd's Board of Directors approved the Audited Financial Statements and Results for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. Concurrently, Mr. Abhishek Bansal resigned from his position as Chief Financial Officer and Key Managerial Personnel, effective April 15, 2026. His resignation is attributed to personal career considerations and exploring external opportunities, with no connection to the company's operations, financial reporting, or governance. The company expressed appreciation for his 12 years of service, including over 8 years as CFO. The Auditors' Report on the financial results carried an unmodified opinion.

  • Just Dial's Board approved Audited Financial Results for FY26.
  • CFO Abhishek Bansal resigned, effective April 15, 2026.
  • Resignation is due to personal career considerations.
  • Auditors issued an unmodified opinion on FY26 financial results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JUST DIAL LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [HCL-INSYS] HCL Infosystems Appoints Gaurav Bhalla as Manager & KMP
item.description:
HCL Infosystems Ltd has announced the appointment of Mr. Gaurav Bhalla as a Manager and Key Managerial Personnel (KMP) for a five-year term, effective May 1, 2026. This appointment was approved by the company's shareholders via a special resolution passed through a postal ballot on April 13, 2026. Mr. Bhalla brings approximately 20 years of experience in financial planning and analysis, business finance, accounts, mergers and acquisitions, and corporate governance. His expertise also includes managing statutory audits for listed entities, financial results consolidation, and risk assessment. This change in management is in compliance with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • HCL Infosystems appointed Gaurav Bhalla as Manager and KMP.
  • His term is for five years, effective from May 1, 2026.
  • Shareholders approved the appointment via postal ballot on April 13, 2026.
  • Mr. Bhalla has 20 years of experience in finance, M&A, and corporate governance.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HCL INFOSYSTEMS LTD. | Category: Management Change
